mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.role_id, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id

SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.role_id, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.role_id, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.username LIKE '%${keyword}%' OR u.real_name LIKE '%${keyword}%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, dept_id, email, phone, status, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{deptId}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, NOW())
